message:
test(e2e): add safety status/check end-to-end tests

225-line e2e test exercising the ntm safety command suite: verifying
safety status JSON output (installed flag, policy path, blocked/approval/
allowed rule counts, wrapper path, hook installation), safety check
against known destructive commands, and response format validation.
Tagged with build constraint e2e.

Bead: bd-3ooxy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
